name: Wrong or stale entry
about: Flag an entry that has incorrect information or needs updating
title: '[Update] '
labels: update-needed
assignees: ''

---

**Entry ID**
<!-- e.g., wa-rcw-49-12-240-personnel-records -->

**What's wrong**
<!-- Brief description of the issue: stale statute reference, incorrect citation, outdated rate, etc. -->

**Correction**
<!-- What it should say -->

**Source for the correction** (if any)
<!-- Link to current statute, new case, legislative session info -->

**How urgent**
<!-- Low (cosmetic, citation form) / Medium (substantive but not operational risk) / High (affects current decisions) -->
